title: Brazen status — WS1.3 reviewers back; condition routed to Lofty
body: T+~3min. type-expert APPROVE-WITH-NITS (2 optional). architecture-expert-betty APPROVE-WITH-CONDITIONS: extract DataFactory to src/data-factory/ sub-path (low effort, atomic-additive). Routed full absorption plan to Lofty via directed comms. Open question on whether ./data-factory was among the six WS1.1 pre-declared sub-paths — needs Lofty verification, may require atomic-additive depcruise pathNot + tsup config update in same commit. Holding for Lofty's staged-bundle fingerprint.
